name: Deutsch Bank - AI Engineer
content:
Job Title: AI Engineer

Location: Pune, India 

Corporate Title: Associate

Role Description

The AI Engineer designs, builds, and operates high‑quality, scalable AI solutions to meet current and future business needs of internal stakeholders in a timely manner. They leverage modern AI engineering, data, and cloud toolkits to develop production‑ready models, agents, and automation solutions that create sustainable business value. Reporting to the Team Leader of the Data and AI team in Berlin, the AI Engineer will be a member of the newly established CEO–Chairman Technology Team for Data Analytics and AI.
This Center of Excellence enables all CEO Chairman functions through AI engineering, advanced analytics, and automation solutions. As part of a newly founded team, the AI Engineer will pioneer the development of innovative AI‑driven applications, establish robust engineering standards, and help shape scalable, effective processes that will be instrumental to the long‑term success of the function.


What We’ll Offer You

As part of our flexible scheme, here are just some of the benefits that you’ll enjoy

Best in class leave policy
Gender neutral parental leaves
100% reimbursement under childcare assistance benefit (gender neutral)
Sponsorship for Industry relevant certifications and education
Employee Assistance Program for you and your family members
Comprehensive Hospitalization Insurance for you and your dependents
Accident and Term life Insurance
Complementary Health screening for 35 yrs. and above


Your Key Responsibilities

Design and Development of AI models in particular within area of Natural Language Processing and GenerativeAI
Broad knowledge to explore, implement, train and evaluate identified AI models and their respective MLOps activities with Python and Project Jupyter toolset.
Deep experience in developing self-service analytics solutions using Python and SQL.
Adopt to hybrid and native cloud technologies with OpenShift and Google Cloud Platform.
Driving software engineering principles within the team adopting market’s best practices alongside with DB’s principles and procedures to deliver high-quality solutions through coding, system testing and documentation.
Enhance existing data-driven solutions regarding data ingest, transformation, reporting and machine learning capabilities. Identify automation opportunities and develop solutions that simplify data delivery processes and make them more efficient with AI workflows.


Your Skills And Experience

Master’s degree (or equivalent) from an accredited college or university (or equivalent) in a quantitative field (Mathematics, Statistics, Physics, Engineering, Computer Science etc.) or equivalent work experience ideally in the banking industry.
Multiple years’ experience as data scientist or AI engineer ideally using Python, SQL and Docker Micro Services
Experience on development frameworks for both frontend and backend (e.g. Python Pandas, NumPy, Flask)
Deep knowledge of big data analytics/AI architectures (i.e. Data Warehousing, ETL) on hybrid cloud environments in particular OpenShift and Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
Multiple years of experience in finance industry, internal audit functions or high regulated environments is considered a plus


How We’ll Support You

Training and development to help you excel in your career
Coaching and support from experts in your team
A culture of continuous learning to aid progression
A range of flexible benefits that you can tailor to suit your needs


About Us And Our Teams

Please visit our company website for further information:

https://www.db.com/company/company.html

We strive for a culture in which we are empowered to excel together every day. This includes acting responsibly, thinking commercially, taking initiative and working collaboratively.

Together we share and celebrate the successes of our people. Together we are Deutsche Bank Group.

We welcome applications from all people and promote a positive, fair and inclusive work environment.

name: Persistent Systems — Agentic AI Engineer
content:
Role: Agentic AI Engineer
Company: Persistent Systems
Location: Pune, India (Hybrid)
Experience: 7-12 years preferred (5+ years considered)

About the Role:
Persistent Systems is expanding its Agentic AI practice, building enterprise multi-agent pipelines for BFSI, healthcare, and hi-tech clients. We are looking for an AI Engineer who can architect, build, and ship production-grade agentic systems — not just prototype them.

Key Responsibilities:
- Design and implement multi-agent systems using LangGraph, CrewAI, and/or AutoGen
- Build and maintain MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers for agent tool use
- Integrate LLMs (OpenAI, Claude, Ollama/open-source) into agentic workflows
- Build production RAG pipelines with vector databases (Pinecone, ChromaDB, FAISS)
- Implement agent evaluation, observability, and LLMOps pipelines
- Deliver end-to-end AI/ML pipelines from research through production deployment
- Collaborate with client stakeholders across geographies

Required Skills:
- LangGraph: graph-based agent orchestration (mandatory)
- CrewAI and/or AutoGen: multi-agent frameworks
- MCP (Model Context Protocol): tool use and server integration
- Multi-agent systems: supervisor pattern, parallel execution, inter-agent communication
- LLM integration: OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Ollama, HuggingFace
- RAG and vector databases: Pinecone, ChromaDB, FAISS
- Python: advanced (5+ years)
- End-to-end AI/ML pipeline delivery

Good to Have:
- LangSmith for evaluation and tracing
- AWS / Azure / GCP deployment experience
- Docker and containerisation
- Semantic Kernel, AutoGen actor model familiarity

Why Join:
Persistent is the fastest-growing IT services brand globally (Brand Finance 2026). Our GenAI Hub (launched 2024) is a serious internal investment, not a label. You will work on real enterprise agentic AI problems with Fortune 500 clients.

name: Persistent Systems — GenAI Engineer
content:
Role: GenAI Engineer
Company: Persistent Systems
Location: Pune, India
Experience: 5-8 years

About the Role:
Persistent Systems is looking for a GenAI Engineer to join our AI engineering team, building and managing GenAI solutions for enterprise clients. This is a front-line engineering role: you will own GenAI projects from brief through to client delivery.

Mandatory Requirements:
- LangGraph: #1 preferred framework — must have hands-on project experience
- MCP (Model Context Protocol): must-have — building tool-use servers for agents
- Multi-agent systems and orchestration
- Agentic AI: minimum 6 months hands-on experience required
- Generative AI: ~3 years preferred
- AWS: working understanding (EC2, S3, deployment)
- Python: advanced (core language)
- Full AI/ML lifecycle project management

Key Responsibilities:
- Build and ship LangGraph-based agentic pipelines for client use cases
- Implement MCP tool servers to extend agent capabilities
- Design and deliver RAG systems with vector databases
- Manage GenAI projects from prototyping through client delivery
- Communicate clearly with client stakeholders
- Evaluate and iterate on GenAI solutions using LLM evaluation frameworks

Required Technical Skills:
- LangGraph, LangChain, CrewAI
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) — tool server implementation
- RAG pipelines: vector stores, embeddings, retrieval strategies
- LLMs: OpenAI, Anthropic, open-source (Ollama, HuggingFace)
- Python: advanced (asyncio, FastAPI, Pydantic)
- Core ML/Deep Learning foundations (PyTorch, TensorFlow)
- AWS working knowledge

Good to Have:
- LangSmith, RAGAS, or other LLM evaluation frameworks
- Docker / containerisation
- FAISS, Pinecone, ChromaDB experience

name: IBM Consulting — Data Scientist AI
content:
Role: Data Scientist / AI Engineer
Company: IBM Consulting
Location: Pune / Bangalore, India
Experience: 4-8 years

About IBM Consulting:
IBM Consulting is the professional services arm of IBM, serving Fortune 500 clients globally across financial services, healthcare, government, and telecommunications. Our AI practice builds cognitive computing and GenAI solutions using IBM watsonx and strategic LLM partnerships.

Role Overview:
We are looking for an experienced Data Scientist/AI Engineer to design, develop, and deploy AI solutions for IBM's enterprise clients. You will work across the full AI project lifecycle — from data analysis through model deployment — in a client-facing consulting environment.

Required Skills:
- Foundation Models / LLMs: design, integration, and deployment
- NLP: sentiment analysis, text classification, document understanding
- ML/DL Frameworks: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras (mandatory)
- HuggingFace Transformers: BERT, GPT, T5 or equivalent
- Python: strong proficiency
- AI Project Lifecycle Management: research to production delivery
- Cloud Platforms: AWS, Azure, or GCP experience
- Structured and Unstructured Data Analysis
- SQL databases; NoSQL experience preferred (MongoDB, DB2)
- GitHub Copilot or similar AI coding assistants

Preferred Qualifications:
- Master's degree in Computer Science, Data Science, or related field (BE considered for strong candidates)
- IBM Watson / IBM AI Platform familiarity (training provided)
- Kubernetes and CI/CD pipeline experience
- Voice/video data processing experience
- Azure or AWS ML platform experience (SageMaker, Azure ML)

Key Responsibilities:
- Build and deploy AI/ML models for enterprise client use cases
- Work with unstructured data (documents, text, images) to build cognitive computing solutions
- Integrate foundation models and LLMs into client workflows
- Collaborate with cross-functional client stakeholders
- Present findings and model outputs to non-technical stakeholders

What IBM Offers:
- Fortune 500 client exposure globally
- IBM internal AI learning ecosystem (watsonx training)
- Structured career progression: Data Scientist → Senior → Principal
- Strong benefits and stable employment

name: NTT DATA — Mid GenAI Engineer
content:
Role: Mid GenAI Engineer (Agentic AI Specialist)
Company: NTT DATA
Location: Pune, India
Experience: 5+ years

About NTT DATA:
NTT DATA is a $30 billion global IT services leader, part of NTT Group (investing $3.6B/year in R&D). We serve 75% of the Fortune Global 100 across 50+ countries. Our India GenAI practice (Pune) is a core delivery hub for enterprise agentic AI solutions.

Role Overview:
We are looking for a Mid GenAI Engineer with strong hands-on experience in agentic AI systems to join our Pune delivery team. You will build enterprise-grade chatbots, workflow agents, and RAG systems for global Fortune 100 clients.

Resume Selection Checklist (minimum bar):
- 2+ GenAI/Agentic solutions delivered end-to-end
- 5+ years Python development
- 3-5 client POCs or MVPs delivered
- 2+ models deployed to production

Required Technical Skills:
- Agentic systems: workflow agents, graph agents, tool use, memory management
- LangGraph, LangChain, CrewAI (explicitly required — at least two of these)
- Hybrid search + vector stores + re-ranking (bi-encoder + cross-encoder)
- LLM evaluation and observability: RAGAS, LLM-as-judge, hallucination detection
- Guardrails, PII redaction, policy filters, agent observability
- Production MLOps: minimum 2 models deployed in production
- Chunking strategies and continuous data quality pipelines
- Open-source LLMs: Ollama, HuggingFace, LLaMA/Mistral
- Python: 5+ years (asyncio, FastAPI, Pydantic)
- Hyperscaler deployment: AWS, Azure, or GCP

Good to Have:
- Semantic Kernel
- AutoGen
- LangSmith tracing and evaluation
- Kubernetes / Docker orchestration
- Fine-tuning with PEFT/LoRA

Key Responsibilities:
- Build and ship agentic pipelines for Fortune 100 client use cases
- Implement production RAG systems with evaluation and guardrails
- Collaborate with multi-geography client stakeholders (US/Europe)
- Evaluate and benchmark LLM solutions for production readiness
- Maintain LLMOps pipelines for deployed models

Benefits:
- Global Fortune 100 client exposure
- NTT DATA University: certification reimbursement and internal learning
- Stable employment with clear career progression
- Pune base — no relocation

name: Ascendion — GenAI Engineer
content:
Role: GenAI Engineer
Company: Ascendion (formerly Collabera Digital)
Location: Pune / Remote, India
Experience: 4+ years

About Ascendion:
Ascendion is an AI-first technology services company serving Fortune 500 enterprise clients in Life Sciences, Healthcare, Financial Services, and Technology. We embed GenAI engineers directly with enterprise clients to build production LLM solutions.

Role Overview:
We are looking for a GenAI Engineer to build and deploy LLM-based solutions for enterprise clients, primarily in the Life Sciences and Healthcare space. This is a client-embedded role — you will work closely with the client's internal teams.

Required Skills:
- Generative AI / LLMs: OpenAI, Anthropic, HuggingFace — hands-on integration experience
- RAG pipelines and embeddings: design, build, and evaluate
- Prompt engineering and prompt frameworks: system prompts, chain-of-thought, iterative refinement
- Vector databases: Pinecone, Weaviate, FAISS, or equivalent
- Enterprise workflow integration and REST APIs
- Model performance evaluation, scalability, and cost efficiency analysis
- Cloud platforms: AWS, Azure, or GCP deployment experience
- Python: strong proficiency
- Git, CI/CD pipelines, Docker

Preferred / Good to Have:
- Fine-tuning / customising foundation models (PEFT, LoRA)
- Life Sciences or Healthcare domain experience (strong preferred)
- Airflow, DBT, or Spark for data pipelines
- Kubernetes orchestration
- LLMOps frameworks and monitoring

Key Responsibilities:
- Design and implement LLM-based solutions for enterprise Life Sciences clients
- Build and optimise RAG pipelines with embedding strategies and retrieval optimisation
- Integrate GenAI solutions into existing enterprise workflows via APIs
- Evaluate model performance for accuracy, latency, and cost
- Iterate on prompts and architectures under client feedback
- Communicate technical solutions clearly to non-technical client stakeholders

What We Offer:
- Remote / hybrid flexibility from Pune
- US Fortune 500 client exposure (Life Sciences / Healthcare focus)
- Fast-moving AI-first culture vs. traditional IT services
- Growth tied to client success — high performers promoted quickly

name: EY GDS — Staff GenAI Engineer
content:
Role: Staff GenAI Engineer
Company: EY GDS (Global Delivery Services) — AI & Analytics Team
Location: Pune, India (Hinjewadi) — Hybrid (3 days in office)
Experience: 3+ years

About EY GDS:
EY (Ernst & Young) is one of the Big 4 professional services firms ($49B+ revenue, 395,000+ employees globally). EY GDS is EY's offshore delivery network. The AI & Analytics (AIA) team in Pune builds GenAI components for EY's global consulting engagements.

Role Overview:
The Staff GenAI Engineer implements GenAI pipelines to architectures defined by senior engineers. This is an execution-quality role — reliable implementation, prompt iteration, and delivery within EY's engineering standards. Big 4 brand value on your CV; structured career progression (Staff → Senior → Manager track).

Mandatory Technical Skills:
- RAG pipelines: implement retrieval-augmented generation based on provided architecture
- Prompt engineering: iterate and refine prompts under defined quality standards
- FastAPI: REST API development and LLM integration
- LangChain and LangGraph: hands-on experience required
- Vector databases and embeddings: implementation experience
- AWS Bedrock and/or Azure OpenAI: hands-on or strong familiarity
- JWT authentication implementation in Python
- AWS deployment and CI/CD standards
- Python OOP: strong proficiency

Good to Have:
- LLMOps, evaluation frameworks (RAGAS, LLM-as-judge), and monitoring
- DynamoDB or other AWS NoSQL databases
- Docker and containerisation
- Azure OpenAI endpoint integration

Key Responsibilities:
- Implement RAG components and LLM pipelines to provided architecture specifications
- Develop and iterate on prompts for enterprise use cases
- Build FastAPI services to expose GenAI capabilities as REST APIs
- Integrate with vector databases and embedding models
- Follow EY engineering standards for security (JWT auth), testing, and CI/CD
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical documentation

EY Benefits:
- Big 4 brand — strong CV value for future career moves
- EY Badges and EY Tech MBA — active learning culture
- Structured promotion criteria: Staff → Senior (typically 2-3 years)
- Strong benefits package: health insurance, meal cards, cab facility, EAP
- Hybrid work: 3 days in office (Hinjewadi), flexibility otherwise
